ddls:
CREATE TABLE "councils" (
  "council_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local council */,
  "council_name" TEXT /* Name of the local council */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the local council */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the council */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the local council */,
  "waste_management_policy" TEXT /* Description of the council's waste management policy */,
  "environmental_services_offered" TEXT /* Description of the environmental services offered by the council */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("council_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste collection activity */,
  "council_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local council */,
  "waste_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waste type */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the waste collection */,
  "amount_collected" REAL /* Amount of waste collected */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kg, tons) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for waste collection (e.g., curbside, drop-off) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of waste collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used for waste collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_collection_council_id FOREIGN KEY ("council_id") REFERENCES councils ("council_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_collection_waste_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("waste_type_id") REFERENCES waste_types ("waste_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_collection_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_types" (
  "waste_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste type */,
  "waste_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the waste type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the waste type */,
  "recyclable" INTEGER /* Whether the waste type is recyclable */,
  "hazardous" INTEGER /* Whether the waste type is hazardous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "litter_collection" (
  "litter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each litter collection activity */,
  "council_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local council */,
  "litter_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the litter type */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the litter collection */,
  "amount_collected" REAL /* Amount of litter collected */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kg, tons) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for litter collection (e.g., manual, mechanical) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of litter collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used for litter collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("litter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_litter_collection_council_id FOREIGN KEY ("council_id") REFERENCES councils ("council_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_litter_collection_litter_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("litter_type_id") REFERENCES litter_types ("litter_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_litter_collection_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "litter_types" (
  "litter_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each litter type */,
  "litter_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the litter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the litter type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the litter (e.g., household, industrial, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("litter_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., environmental officer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "council_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local council the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., waste management, environmental services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_council_id FOREIGN KEY ("council_id") REFERENCES councils ("council_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., waste_collection, litter_collection) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "council_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local council */,
  "complaint_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint type */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was received */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_complaint_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_type_id") REFERENCES complaint_types ("complaint_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_council_id FOREIGN KEY ("council_id") REFERENCES councils ("council_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van) */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_types" (
  "complaint_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint type */,
  "complaint_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the complaint type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
